thinking.text:
I need to calculate 17 multiplied by 23. Let me break it down to make sure I get it right.

First, I can use the distributive property of multiplication over addition to break this down into simpler parts. I know that 23 can be written as 20 + 3. So, 17 * 23 is the same as 17 * (20 + 3).

Now, I can multiply 17 by each part separately:
1. 17 * 20 = 340
2. 17 * 3 = 51

Now, add those two results together:
340 + 51 = 391

So, 17 * 23 equals 391.
